title: dalbergia madagascariensis subsp. antongilensis
intro: Dalbergia madagascariensis subsp. antongilensis is a subspecies of the Dalbergia madagascariensis tree, native to Madagascar and known for its medicinal and timber properties. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The extracts from Dalbergia madagascariensis subsp. antongilensis are used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to create infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
